name: Rookie Cup Opening
briefing: Opening day at Ashford Oval. Copper Gate attacks early from Oak Lane while the player stable settles into the season.

name: Bracken Pressure
briefing: Golden Switch brings Stormforge sprint pressure to Bracken Dirt. A rested stable can absorb the early pace.

name: Meadowbrook Trial
briefing: River Chime gets Heatherbank support on soft turf. Training before this race rewards handling and stamina.

name: Highcliff Ascent
briefing: The season climbs to Highcliff Rise. Storm Marrow relishes the uphill turn while wind rakes the exposed descent. Pace the climb or pay for it on the run home.

name: Ironwood Switchback
briefing: Ironwood hosts a wet technical round. Storm Marrow becomes the late rival to watch through the final bend.

name: Fog Gauntlet
briefing: Fog swallows Bracken Dirt. Sound leads where sight fails, and Copper Gate presses the blind sprint from Stormforge. Trust the audio cues over instinct.

name: Bracken Showdown
briefing: The dirt rematch decides the sprint rivalry. Rest protects energy; career training can create a late-season edge.

name: Highcliff Storm
briefing: Rain turns the Highcliff climb treacherous. Golden Switch and Storm Marrow trade the lead through the streaming final bend. Energy saved earlier decides who holds the hill.

name: Ashford Final
briefing: Final round in rain at Ashford. Stable identity, rewards, rival points, and energy all converge for the title.
